mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, provider_name, trigger_type, status, start_time, end_time, duration, channel_count, error_message, raw_content, created_at, updated_at FROM m3u8_refresh_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m3u8_refresh_task ( provider_id, provider_name, trigger_type, status, start_time, end_time, duration, channel_count, error_message, raw_content, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{providerId}, #{providerName}, #{triggerType}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{channelCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{rawContent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE m3u8_refresh_task SET provider_id = #{providerId}, provider_name = #{providerName}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, channel_count = #{channelCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, raw_content = #{rawContent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
